target_rows.selection_note: The full recovered top-100 pool is used so target selection is not tuned to evaluation-only first-correct ranks.

problem_statement.fact: The recovered-row handoff has two valid-containing deeper backend pools and one excluded no-valid backend/source-map blind spot.
problem_statement.agent_inference: The next uncertainty test is no longer candidate-pool recall. It is whether active observation can turn each recovered semantic candidate into candidate-specific goal-validity evidence instead of category-level visibility evidence.
problem_statement.paper_constraint: This contract defines planner/objective evidence only. It does not permit ObjectNav terminal commit, first_eval rerun, policy-scale comparison, or paper utility claim.

planner.input_scope: all 200 candidate evidence target rows from recovered request rows
planner.candidate_target_rule: one target candidate per plan row

context_candidate_rule.reason: Detector/SAM2 association must compare a target projection against local rival candidates; otherwise category visibility could be mistaken for ObjectNav goal validity.

candidate_evidence_classes.candidate_specific_support: target candidate has own-view detector/SAM2/depth association and local rival candidates do not have equal-or-stronger association in the same evidence context
candidate_evidence_classes.category_only_support: target category is detected but target projection/depth/mask association is absent
candidate_evidence_classes.cross_view_or_rival_ambiguous: target and rival candidates are both supported or rival support is stronger
candidate_evidence_classes.no_visual_support: no detector/mask evidence supports the target category from the planned view
candidate_evidence_classes.unrenderable_or_unreachable: candidate has no acceptable navmesh standoff plan

request_level_rule_for_later_validation.commit_condition_draft: exactly one candidate in the request has candidate_specific_support and no rival ambiguity; otherwise defer or request another evidence branch
request_level_rule_for_later_validation.reason: This rule must be tested after detector/SAM2 evidence exists and before any ObjectNav terminal commit is allowed.

required_feature_groups: target detector box and SAM2 mask association
rival projection / mask / depth association in the same context
category-only detector visibility separated from candidate-specific support
viewpoint reachability and standoff travel proxy

forbidden_action_inputs: terminal commit or goal switch from this evidence contract
expected_next_steps: Implement and Docker-smoke the candidate-specific goal-validity evidence planner.
Render a bounded frame/projection smoke from the plan before detector/SAM2 scoring.
Run detector/SAM2 substrate only after frame/projection sanity passes.
Define the post-detector objective analyzer before allowing any terminal utility validation.
